guide.title: How to Get Stands in Bizarre Lineage
guide.description: Everything you need to know about acquiring and choosing your first Bizarre Lineage stands. Most stands start with the Stand Arrow path, while special cases require evolution.

core_identity.title: Core Identity

roll.description: Use arrows from chests or quests to spin for new Bizarre Lineage stands.

meta.title: Meta Evolution
meta.description: High-tier Bizarre Lineage stands often trade pure power for high-utility kits.

acquisition.title: Acquisition Strategy for New Players
acquisition.description: Follow these key rules to optimize your account progression and avoid wasting precious Stand Arrows.

arrow_first.title: 01. Arrow First
arrow_first.description: Do not waste time chasing evolutions before you have a stable level 50 character. Standard arrow pulls are your best friends early on.

check_stats.title: 02. Check Stats
check_stats.description: Top-tier evolutions require Prestige 1+ and specific Conjuring stats. Plan your build before committing to a route.

prioritize_pve.title: 03. Prioritize PvE
prioritize_pve.description: Picking a high-AoE stand like Weather Report speeds up your overall progression, making it easier to grind for elite PvP stands.

recommendations.title: Best Bizarre Lineage Stands by Role
recommendations.description: If you need a quick answer, these are the stands we recommend based on current community meta research.

pvp.title: Best PvP Stand: Star Platinum
pvp.description: The clearest current PvP benchmark. Combines pressure, burst, and broad matchup value.

pve.title: Best PvE Stand: Weather Report
pve.description: Screen-wide AoE and mission clearing speed make this the king of grinding.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about Bizarre Lineage stands, evolutions, and the current meta.

items.question: How do I get my first stand in Bizarre Lineage?
items.answer: You need a Stand Arrow, which can be found in chests around the map, earned from quests, or claimed from active codes. Once you have an arrow, use it from your inventory to roll for a random stand.

items.question: Can I change my stand after rolling it?
items.answer: Yes, but using a new Stand Arrow will overwrite your current stand unless you have unlocked Stand Storage through Prestige. It is usually worth saving a strong stand before rolling again.

items.question: What is the difference between Arrow stands and Evolution stands?
items.answer: Arrow stands come directly from using a Stand Arrow. Evolution stands such as Made in Heaven or C-Moon require a base stand plus a higher-level route or questline.

items.question: Which stand is best for fast leveling and farming?
items.answer: Weather Report is one of the strongest PvE recommendations because its wide-area attacks clear missions and farming loops faster than more duel-focused stands.

items.question: What are the requirements for evolving a stand?
items.answer: Most evolutions require Prestige progress, Conjuring investment, and a route-specific quest or item check before the evolution can happen.

items.question: How do stand tiers affect gameplay?
items.answer: Higher-tier stands usually offer better damage scaling, stronger control, or more reliable matchups. Even so, matchup knowledge and route context still matter more than a letter grade alone.

items.question: Are there shiny or secret stand skins?
items.answer: Yes. Bizarre Lineage includes stand skins that change visuals without changing power, and they are usually tied to Lucky Arrows or limited events.
